subcodes.first_line: O thou who art enkindled with the fire of God's love! That which the pen of that sanctified soul hath written was read with utmost affection [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای مشتعل بنار محبت الهی آنچه از قلم آن نفس زکیه تحریر یافته بود بکمال حب قرائت شد
subcodes.subjects: @characteristics and conduct of true believers, @firmness in the Covenant, @praise and encouragement, @radiant countenance; bearing the divine fragrance
